footer.contactText: We are always ready to serve you and provide the best solutions in the automotive world. Please contact us for more information or business partnerships.
footer.copyright: © {year} Hussein Ghulam Motors. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Global Car Trading & Premium Automotive Solutions
hero.description: Import, export, logistics, rentals, and showroom operations.

cta.headline: Build your automotive experience
cta.description: From car trading to logistics, rentals, and showroom operations — we deliver end-to-end automotive solutions designed for scale.

samarra.title: Samarra Showroom
samarra.desc: Establishment of the showroom in Samarra, Iraq. The beginning of Hussein Ghulam Motors' journey.

baghdad.title: Baghdad Branch
baghdad.desc: Al-Fakhama Road branch opened in Baghdad, expanding presence in the domestic market.

erbil.title: Erbil Branch
erbil.desc: Opening of the Erbil branch in the Kurdistan Region, strengthening regional presence.

amman.title: Amman Branch
amman.desc: Launch of the Amman Free Zone branch, marking the first step toward international expansion.

syrianJordanian.title: Syrian-Jordanian Free Zone
syrianJordanian.desc: Opening of the branch in the Syrian-Jordanian Free Zone to expand cross-border operations.

shipping.title: Al-Ghulam Shipping Company
shipping.desc: Establishment of Al-Ghulam Shipping Company and entry into the logistics services sector.

dubai.title: Dubai Branch
dubai.desc: Launch of Hussein Ghulam Motors branch in Dubai, UAE.

squareMotors.title: Square Motors
squareMotors.desc: Opening of the second UAE branch in Dubai under the name Square Motors.

guangzhou.title: Guangzhou Office
guangzhou.desc: Opening of the Guangzhou office in China (Fanko), expanding the global supply network.

rental.title: Car Rental Company
rental.desc: Launch of the Dubai car rental company with a fleet of 600 vehicles.

spareParts.title: HG Spare Parts
spareParts.desc: Entry into the spare parts market under the HG Spare Parts brand.

markets.title: Our Markets
markets.description: We serve diverse automotive markets across Africa, South America, Asia, and Europe through trusted regional networks.

presence.title: Our Presence
presence.description: Our physical presence connects key automotive hubs across the Middle East, North Africa, and international trade zones.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: We operate across the full automotive ecosystem — connecting trade, logistics, rental operations, and global showroom management into a unified system.
services.note: Built for precision, scale, and long-term operational trust.

items.rental: Car rental with a comprehensive fleet
items.showrooms: Management and operation of international showrooms

contactPage.description: We're always ready to serve you and provide the best solutions in the automotive world. Reach out for enquiries or business partnerships.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.section1Body: When you use this website — for example, by submitting an enquiry form or contacting us via WhatsApp — we may collect your name, email address, phone number, and any message details you provide.
privacyPage.section2Body: We use the information you provide to respond to enquiries, share vehicle details, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacyPage.section3Body: This website may use cookies to improve browsing experience, remember preferences, and understand how visitors use the site. You can disable cookies through your browser settings at any time.
privacyPage.section4Body: We may use trusted third-party services (such as analytics or hosting providers) that process data on our behalf. These providers are only permitted to use your data to perform services for us.
privacyPage.section5Body: We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet is entirely secure.
privacyPage.section6Body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us using the details below.
privacyPage.section7Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised "last updated" date.
privacyPage.footerText: Questions about this policy? Contact us at {email}

termsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
termsPage.section1Body: By accessing or using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use this site.
termsPage.section2Body: We make every effort to ensure that vehicle details, specifications, mileage, and pricing shown on this site are accurate and up to date. However, listings may change without notice, and we do not guarantee that all information is free of errors. Please contact us to confirm details before making a purchasing decision.
termsPage.section3Body: All prices are listed in AED unless stated otherwise and are subject to change without prior notice. Prices do not include registration, insurance, or other applicable fees unless explicitly stated.
termsPage.section4Body: You agree to use this website only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, or restrict or inhibit the use and enjoyment of this site by, any third party.
termsPage.section5Body: All content on this site — including text, images, logos, and design — is the property of Hussein Ghulam Motors unless otherwise stated, and may not be reproduced without prior written consent.
termsPage.section6Body: Hussein Ghulam Motors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of this website or reliance on any information contained within it.
termsPage.section7Body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates, and any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Dubai.
termsPage.section8Body: We may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time. Continued use of the website after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
termsPage.footerText: Questions about these terms? Contact us at {email}

shipping.question: Do you provide international car shipping?
shipping.answer: Yes. We manage full export and import operations including documentation, logistics, and global delivery coordination.

rentals.question: Can I rent luxury cars for short periods?
rentals.answer: Yes. Our fleet includes luxury, sports, and economy vehicles available for flexible rental durations.

parts.question: Do you supply genuine spare parts?
parts.answer: We source only verified original parts from certified global suppliers and manufacturers.

showrooms.question: Do you manage international showrooms?
showrooms.answer: Yes. We operate full showroom systems including sales, logistics, and operational management.
